data.title: Schwab Expands Active Fixed Income Lineup With New Core Bond ETF
data.description: Schwab Asset Management launches low-cost Core Bond ETF, providing exposure to U.S. dollar debt securities and flexibility for uncertain times.

data.title: Blockchain decentralization: How it ensures fair and tamper-proof trades
Tesla Sales Drop 60% In Germany: Are Elon Musk's Politics Getting In The Way Of EV Growth?
data.description: Tesla sales dropped significantly in several European countries in the month of January. The drop comes as CEO Elon Musk is supporting a far-right German political party.

data.title: Qualcomm Posts Record Revenue As Analysts Flag Huawei, Tariff Risks
data.description: Shares of Qualcomm Inc (NASDAQ: QCOM) tanked despite record revenues. Analysts bullish about the company benefiting from accelerating AI adoption.

data.title: Huntington Ingalls Sinks On Q4 Earnings Miss, Margins & Cash Flow Take A Hit
data.description: Huntington Ingalls Industries  reported Q4 results with sales of $3B, missing consensus of $3.05B. EPS of $3.15 down 54.3% Y/Y. FY25 outlook: sales $11.8B-$12.2B, Shipbuilding revenue $8.9B-$9.1B, Mission Technologies revenue $2.9B-$3.1B.
